name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn

(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = i
          \/ (* Process i enters critical section *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = i
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          \/ (* Process i exits critical section *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
          \/ (* No change *)
          /\ state' = state
          /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j
                => ~(state[i] = "critical" /\ state[j] = "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery
actions
  choose(i) == 
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ num[i] = 0
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ num[i] \in 1..N
  wait(i) == 
    \E j \in 1..N, j # i :
      /\ flag[j] = TRUE
      \/ /\ flag[j] = FALSE
         /\ num[j] \in 1..N
         /\ num[i] = 0
            \/ /\ num[i] \in 1..N
               /\ num[j] < num[i]
                  \/ /\ num[j] = num[i]
                     /\ j < i
  enter(i) == 
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ num[i] = 0
  exit(i) == 
    /\ num[i] = 0
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
      /\ choose(i)
      /\ wait(i)
      /\ enter(i)
      /\ exit(i)
  Init == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] = 0
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : flag[i] = FALSE
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>
*)

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ K > 0
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1) \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
